name: Tumarkin compact 5D Coxeter polytopes with 8 facets
description: Catalogue for the 15 certified compact hyperbolic Coxeter 5-polytopes with 8 facets and Gale diagram G11411 listed in Tumarkin Table 4.10.

sourceRef.citation: Pavel Tumarkin, Compact Hyperbolic Coxeter n-Polytopes with n+3 Facets, Electronic Journal of Combinatorics 14 (2007), R69.
sourceRef.notes: Lemma 4.7 states that there are 15 compact hyperbolic Coxeter 5-polytopes with 8 facets and Gale diagram G11411. Table 4.10 draws the 15 Coxeter diagrams. The arXiv/source archive stores the table diagrams as EPS artwork rather than a machine-readable Coxeter matrix list.

entries.label: Tumarkin G11411 #1
notes: The Coxeter diagram is transcribed from Tumarkin Table 4.10 arXiv EPS artwork.
The dotted weights are solved from the determinant equations described in Lemma 4.7 and stored as algebraic-real metadata.
The bundled certificate checks source transcription, determinant-equation weights, and normal Gram rank/signature diagnostics.
